root_text.an4.85:2.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo tamo hoti tamaparāyaṇo?
root_text.an4.85:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo nīce kule paccājāto hoti—caṇḍālakule vā venakule vā nesādakule vā rathakārakule vā pukkusakule vā dalidde appannapānabhojane kasiravuttike, yattha kasirena ghāsacchādo labbhati.
root_text.an4.85:2.3: So ca hoti dubbaṇṇo duddasiko okoṭimako bavhābādho kāṇo vā kuṇī vā khañjo vā pakkhahato vā, na lābhī annassa pānassa vatthassa yānassa mālāgandhavilepanassa seyyāvasathapadīpeyyassa.
root_text.an4.85:2.4: So kāyena duccaritaṁ carati, vācāya duccaritaṁ carati, manasā duccaritaṁ carati.
root_text.an4.85:2.5: So kāyena duccaritaṁ caritvā, vācāya duccaritaṁ caritvā, manasā duccaritaṁ caritvā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.an4.85:2.6: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo tamo hoti tamaparāyaṇo.
root_text.an4.85:3.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo tamo hoti jotiparāyaṇo?
root_text.an4.85:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo nīce kule paccājāto hoti—caṇḍālakule vā venakule vā nesādakule vā rathakārakule vā pukkusakule vā dalidde appannapānabhojane kasiravuttike, yattha kasirena ghāsacchādo labbhati;
root_text.an4.85:3.3: so ca hoti dubbaṇṇo duddasiko okoṭimako bavhābādho kāṇo vā kuṇī vā khañjo vā pakkhahato vā na lābhī annassa pānassa vatthassa yānassa mālāgandhavilepanassa seyyāvasathapadīpeyyassa.
root_text.an4.85:3.4: So kāyena sucaritaṁ carati, vācāya sucaritaṁ carati, manasā sucaritaṁ carati.
root_text.an4.85:3.5: So kāyena sucaritaṁ caritvā, vācāya sucaritaṁ caritvā, manasā sucaritaṁ caritvā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.an4.85:3.6: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo tamo hoti jotiparāyaṇo.
root_text.an4.85:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo joti hoti tamaparāyaṇo?
root_text.an4.85:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo ucce kule paccājāto hoti—khattiyamahāsālakule vā brāhmaṇamahāsālakule vā gahapatimahāsālakule vā aḍḍhe mahaddhane mahābhoge pahūtajātarūparajate pahūtavittūpakaraṇe pahūtadhanadhaññe;
root_text.an4.85:4.3: so ca hoti abhirūpo dassanīyo pāsādiko paramāya vaṇṇapokkharatāya samannāgato, lābhī annassa pānassa vatthassa yānassa mālāgandhavilepanassa seyyāvasathapadīpeyyassa.
root_text.an4.85:4.4: So kāyena duccaritaṁ carati, vācāya duccaritaṁ carati, manasā duccaritaṁ carati.
root_text.an4.85:4.5: So kāyena duccaritaṁ caritvā, vācāya duccaritaṁ caritvā, manasā duccaritaṁ caritvā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.an4.85:4.6: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo joti hoti tamaparāyaṇo.
root_text.an4.85:5.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo joti hoti jotiparāyaṇo?
root_text.an4.85:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo ucce kule paccājāto hoti—khattiyamahāsālakule vā brāhmaṇamahāsālakule vā gahapatimahāsālakule vā aḍḍhe mahaddhane mahābhoge pahūtajātarūparajate pahūtavittūpakaraṇe pahūtadhanadhaññe;
root_text.an4.85:5.3: so ca hoti abhirūpo dassanīyo pāsādiko paramāya vaṇṇapokkharatāya samannāgato, lābhī annassa pānassa vatthassa yānassa mālāgandhavilepanassa seyyāvasathapadīpeyyassa.
root_text.an4.85:5.4: So kāyena sucaritaṁ carati, vācāya sucaritaṁ carati, manasā sucaritaṁ carati.
root_text.an4.85:5.5: So kāyena sucaritaṁ caritvā, vācāya sucaritaṁ caritvā, manasā sucaritaṁ caritvā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.an4.85:5.6: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo joti hoti jotiparāyaṇo.
root_text.an4.85:5.7: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.85:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.85:1.5: the light bound for darkness, and
translation_text.an4.85:2.1: And how is an individual dark and bound for darkness?
translation_text.an4.85:2.2: It’s when an individual is reborn in a low family—a family of corpse-workers, bamboo-workers, hunters, chariot-makers, or scavengers—poor, with little to eat or drink, where life is tough, and food and shelter are hard to find.
translation_text.an4.85:2.3: And they’re ugly, unsightly, deformed, sickly—one-eyed, crippled, lame, or half-paralyzed. They don’t get to have food, drink, clothes, and vehicles; garlands, fragrance, and makeup; or bed, house, and lighting.
translation_text.an4.85:2.4: And they do bad things by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an4.85:2.5: When their body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell.
translation_text.an4.85:2.6: That’s how an individual is dark and bound for darkness.
translation_text.an4.85:3.1: And how is an individual dark and bound for light?
translation_text.an4.85:3.2: It’s when an individual is reborn in a low family …
translation_text.an4.85:3.4: But they do good things by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an4.85:3.5: When their body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.
translation_text.an4.85:3.6: That’s how an individual is dark and bound for light.
translation_text.an4.85:4.1: And how is an individual light and bound for darkness?
translation_text.an4.85:4.2: It’s when an individual is reborn in an eminent family—a well-to-do family of aristocrats, brahmins, or householders—rich, affluent, and wealthy, with lots of gold and silver, lots of property and assets, and lots of money and grain.
translation_text.an4.85:4.3: And they’re attractive, good-looking, lovely, of surpassing beauty. They get to have food, drink, clothes, and vehicles; garlands, fragrance, and makeup; and bed, house, and lighting.
translation_text.an4.85:4.4: But they do bad things by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an4.85:4.5: When their body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell.
translation_text.an4.85:4.6: That’s how an individual is light and bound for darkness.
translation_text.an4.85:5.1: And how is an individual light and bound for light?
translation_text.an4.85:5.2: It’s when an individual is reborn in an eminent family …
translation_text.an4.85:5.4: And they do good things by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an4.85:5.5: When their body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.
translation_text.an4.85:5.6: That’s how an individual is light and bound for light.
translation_text.an4.85:5.7: These are the four individuals found in the world.”
